productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteSartorially cutting edge, this mid-top sneaker from Benetton is a closet essential for the cosmopolitan male who must stay in-vogue. A sleek strip of leather to protect the toe box adds a subtle class to the pair. Product DetailsRound toed, casual sneaker in black with lace-ups and a mid-top styling (an ankle strap with Velcro closure)Tough fabric upper with reinforced overlays at the toe, heel collar and midfootPadded collar and tongue and an ergonomically shaped insoleUpper stitched to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves (stitch detail on the outsole)Material and CareBlended fabricWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
